page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7a-nps1.8xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs based on the AMD EPYC 7T83 processor, running at a clock speed of 2.55 GHz. The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. It does not include local storage or GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 8 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong single-core capabilities, with stress-ng single-core CPU performance and PassMark memory scores ranking in the top 25%. Multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and PassMark CPU encryption tests also demonstrate strong performance. Other metrics, including multi-core CPU performance, memory bandwidth, and Redis SET operations, fall within the average range. The hardware configuration supports advanced vector extensions (AVX) and cryptographic acceleration instructions such as AES, VAES, and SHA_NI, which enhance encryption and data manipulation tasks.

This instance offers a balanced qualitative cost efficiency for memory-intensive workloads that do not require local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration. The high memory density makes it suitable for hosting enterprise databases, in-memory caching systems, and memory-heavy data processing pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7a-nps1.8xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual server instance featuring 32 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs and 256.0 GB of RAM. Powered by an AMD EPYC 7T83 processor running at 2.55 GHz, this KVM-based instance provides 8.0 GB of memory per core. It contains no local storage or GPU resources, utilizing an 8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for external connectivity. Benchmark results show strong performance in single-core CPU execution, memory operations, and cryptographic encryption, while multi-core processing and memory bandwidth remain in the average tier. Cryptographic acceleration is supported via AES, VAES, and SHA_NI instruction sets. This hardware profile is well-suited for memory-intensive workloads such as in-memory databases, caching layers, and enterprise applications requiring high memory capacity relative to compute resources.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and high memory density for demanding enterprise database and caching workloads.
